creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Is Maya Bay an overcrowded tourist trap? 🤬👇
 Maya Bay in the Phi Phi Islands is one of the most famous places in Thailand. The reason? 👇
 It’s probably the most beautiful beach in Thailand. It was featured in the movie “The Beach” (you know, the one with Leonardi DiCaprio) 🍿  With its location right between tourist hubs like Phuket and Krabi, it’s on the bucket list of many tourists - so it’s always going to be a place packed with people 🤓  So now that you know that you won’t have The Beach to yourself, maybe it’s a good idea to embrace Maya Bay for what it is - an incredibly beautiful place that you will 100% share with a few other folks 🥰  ⚓️The tour I was on is linked in my bio under “Thailand” or here: destinationwellknown.com/link/mayabay-tour  (sorry that I can’t post a clickable link here)

Have you been to Maya Bay in Thailand? Let me hear your judgment: Is it an overcrowded tourist trap or a bucket-list destination? 🏝️

#mayabay #phiphiisland #thailandtravel #traveltips #aonang #travelguide

transcription.text: Social media told me that Maya Bay in Thailand was extremely overcrowded and definitely not worth it. But I'm pretty happy that I didn't listen and instead just booked a special early morning tour so that I got there before the worst crowds. I'm not saying I had Maya Bay to myself, but to be honest, it's such a massive beach that there was plenty of space to enjoy one of the most impressive places in Thailand. And after Maya Bay, we also got to see a lot of other incredible places. So I'm glad I just took the tour with the mindset that I'm now visiting one of the most popular places in Thailand and there will be other people, but it's still absolutely gorgeous.
